inbox.subject: Quick question about Q4 deliverables
inbox.body: Hey — can you give me a one-line status on the Q4 doc by EOD? Thanks.

inbox.body: Following up — would love to chat about a Director role at OtherCo. Pay range $250k+. Are you exploring?
